title: tephrosia glomeruliflora
intro: Tephrosia glomeruliflora, also known as the hairy tephrosia or hairy milk-pea, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia glomeruliflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine to lower blood sugar levels and reduce stress. In herbal preparations, Tephrosia glomeruliflora is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be taken orally or applied topically to the affected area.
